description: BP Batam: Total permohonan izin masuk per minggu (Executive Summary)
sql_template:
SELECT
    CAST(TRUNC(TGL_STATUS_TERAKHIR, 'IW') AS TIMESTAMP) AS PERIODE,
    COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_MASUK
FROM US_DWH.BI_MART_STATUS_PERIZINAN
WHERE PERIZINAN IN ('PL', 'PB', 'PBUMKU', 'PKKPRL', 'PB')
  AND {tgl_status_terakhir}
  AND {perizinan}
GROUP BY TRUNC(TGL_STATUS_TERAKHIR, 'IW')
ORDER BY TRUNC(TGL_STATUS_TERAKHIR, 'IW') ASC

description: BP Batam: Izin terbit per minggu (Executive Summary)
sql_template:
SELECT
    CAST(TRUNC(TGL_STATUS_TERAKHIR, 'IW') AS TIMESTAMP) AS PERIODE,
    COUNT(*) AS IZIN_TERBIT
FROM US_DWH.BI_MART_STATUS_PERIZINAN
WHERE KATEGORI_STATUS = 'Terbit'
  AND PERIZINAN IN ('PB', 'PBUMKU', 'PL', 'PKKPRL', 'PPKH')
  AND {tgl_status_terakhir}
  AND {perizinan}
GROUP BY TRUNC(TGL_STATUS_TERAKHIR, 'IW')
ORDER BY TRUNC(TGL_STATUS_TERAKHIR, 'IW') ASC

description: BP Batam: Total backlog (belum terbit) per minggu (Executive Summary)
sql_template:
SELECT
    CAST(TRUNC(TGL_STATUS_TERAKHIR, 'IW') AS TIMESTAMP) AS PERIODE,
    COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_BACKLOG
FROM US_DWH.BI_MART_STATUS_PERIZINAN
WHERE KATEGORI_STATUS NOT IN ('Terbit')
  AND KATEGORI_STATUS NOT LIKE '%Ditolak%'
  AND KATEGORI_STATUS NOT LIKE '%Batal%'
  AND PERIZINAN IN ('PB', 'PBUMKU', 'PL', 'PKKPRL', 'PPKH')
  AND {tgl_status_terakhir}
  AND {perizinan}
GROUP BY TRUNC(TGL_STATUS_TERAKHIR, 'IW')
ORDER BY TRUNC(TGL_STATUS_TERAKHIR, 'IW') ASC

description: BP Batam: Permohonan izin yang masih dalam proses per hari (Executive Summary)
sql_template:
SELECT
    TRUNC(TGL_STATUS_TERAKHIR, 'DD') AS TANGGAL,
    COUNT(*) AS JUMLAH_PERMOHONAN
FROM US_DWH.BI_MART_STATUS_PERIZINAN
WHERE UPPER(KATEGORI_STATUS) LIKE '%DALAM PROSES%'
  AND TGL_STATUS_TERAKHIR IS NOT NULL
  AND PERIZINAN IN ('PB', 'PBUMKU', 'PL', 'PKKPRL', 'PPKH')
  AND {tgl_status_terakhir}
  AND {perizinan}
GROUP BY TRUNC(TGL_STATUS_TERAKHIR, 'DD')
ORDER BY TRUNC(TGL_STATUS_TERAKHIR, 'DD') ASC

description: BP Batam: Sebaran permohonan berdasarkan jenis izin dan kelompok status (Executive Summary)
sql_template:
SELECT
    CASE PERIZINAN
        WHEN 'PBUMKU' THEN 'PBUMKU'
        WHEN 'PB' THEN 'PB'
        WHEN 'PL' THEN 'PL'
        WHEN 'PKKPRL' THEN 'PKKPRL'
        WHEN 'PPKH' THEN 'PPKH'
        ELSE PERIZINAN
    END AS JENIS_IZIN,
    CASE
        WHEN KATEGORI_STATUS = 'Terbit' THEN 'Terbit'
        WHEN KATEGORI_STATUS LIKE '%Tolak%'
          OR KATEGORI_STATUS LIKE '%Ditolak%'
          OR KATEGORI_STATUS LIKE '%Rejected%' THEN 'Tolak'
        ELSE 'Proses'
    END AS KELOMPOK_STATUS,
    COUNT(*) AS JUMLAH
FROM US_DWH.BI_MART_STATUS_PERIZINAN
WHERE 1 = 1
  AND PERIZINAN IN ('PL', 'PBUMKU', 'PKKPRL', 'PPKH', 'PB')
  AND {kategori_status}
  AND {perizinan}
  AND {tgl_status_terakhir}
GROUP BY
    PERIZINAN,
    CASE
        WHEN KATEGORI_STATUS = 'Terbit' THEN 'Terbit'
        WHEN KATEGORI_STATUS LIKE '%Tolak%'
          OR KATEGORI_STATUS LIKE '%Ditolak%'
          OR KATEGORI_STATUS LIKE '%Rejected%' THEN 'Tolak'
        ELSE 'Proses'
    END
ORDER BY JUMLAH DESC

description: BP Batam: Komposisi keseluruhan status perizinan per minggu (Executive Summary)
sql_template:
SELECT
    CAST(TRUNC(TGL_STATUS_TERAKHIR, 'IW') AS TIMESTAMP) AS PERIODE,
    CASE
        WHEN KATEGORI_STATUS = 'Terbit' THEN 'Terbit'
        WHEN KATEGORI_STATUS LIKE '%Tolak%'
          OR KATEGORI_STATUS LIKE '%Ditolak%'
          OR KATEGORI_STATUS LIKE '%Rejected%' THEN 'Ditolak'
        ELSE 'Dalam Proses'
    END AS KELOMPOK_STATUS,
    COUNT(*) AS JUMLAH
FROM US_DWH.BI_MART_STATUS_PERIZINAN
WHERE {tgl_status_terakhir}
  AND PERIZINAN IN ('PB', 'PBUMKU', 'PL', 'PKKPRL', 'PPKH')
  AND {perizinan}
  AND {kategori_status}
GROUP BY
    TRUNC(TGL_STATUS_TERAKHIR, 'IW'),
    CASE
        WHEN KATEGORI_STATUS = 'Terbit' THEN 'Terbit'
        WHEN KATEGORI_STATUS LIKE '%Tolak%'
          OR KATEGORI_STATUS LIKE '%Ditolak%'
          OR KATEGORI_STATUS LIKE '%Rejected%' THEN 'Ditolak'
        ELSE 'Dalam Proses'
    END
ORDER BY TRUNC(TGL_STATUS_TERAKHIR, 'IW') ASC, JUMLAH DESC
examples: Rekap status izin terbit ditolak proses

description: DMT1: Total seluruh permohonan izin (chart Ringkasan)
DMT1: Total izin dalam proses pelaku usaha (chart Ringkasan)
examples: Jumlah izin yang masih draft atau menunggu pemohon

description: DMT1: Total izin dalam proses internal (chart Ringkasan)
sql_template:
SELECT
    COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_DALAM_PROSES
FROM US_DWH.BI_MART_STATUS_PERIZINAN
WHERE 1 = 1
  AND PERIZINAN IN ('PL', 'PBUMKU', 'PKKPRL', 'PPKH', 'PB')
  AND KATEGORI_STATUS != 'Terbit'
  AND UPPER(KATEGORI_STATUS) NOT LIKE '%TOLAK%'
  AND UPPER(KATEGORI_STATUS) NOT LIKE '%DITOLAK%'
  AND UPPER(KATEGORI_STATUS) NOT LIKE '%REJECTED%'
  AND UPPER(KATEGORI_STATUS) NOT LIKE '%DRAFT%'
  AND UPPER(KATEGORI_STATUS) NOT LIKE '%PELAKU USAHA%'
  AND UPPER(KATEGORI_STATUS) NOT LIKE '%WAITING FOR USER%'
  AND {tahun}
  AND {bulan}
  AND {perizinan}

description: DMT1: Sebaran izin per jenis dan kelompok status (chart Komposisi Izin)
sql_template:
SELECT
    JENIS_IZIN,
    KELOMPOK_STATUS,
    COUNT(*) AS JUMLAH
FROM (
    SELECT
        PERIZINAN AS JENIS_IZIN,
        CASE
            WHEN KATEGORI_STATUS = 'Terbit' THEN 'Terbit'
            WHEN UPPER(KATEGORI_STATUS) LIKE '%TOLAK%' OR UPPER(KATEGORI_STATUS) LIKE '%DITOLAK%' OR UPPER(KATEGORI_STATUS) LIKE '%REJECTED%' THEN 'Tolak'
            WHEN UPPER(KATEGORI_STATUS) LIKE '%DRAFT%' OR UPPER(KATEGORI_STATUS) LIKE '%PELAKU USAHA%' OR UPPER(KATEGORI_STATUS) LIKE '%WAITING FOR USER%' THEN 'Proses Pelaku Usaha'
            ELSE 'Dalam Proses'
        END AS KELOMPOK_STATUS
    FROM US_DWH.BI_MART_STATUS_PERIZINAN
    WHERE 1 = 1
      AND PERIZINAN IN ('PL', 'PBUMKU', 'PKKPRL', 'PPKH', 'PB')
      AND {tahun}
      AND {bulan}
      AND {perizinan}
      AND {kategori_status}
) sub
GROUP BY
    JENIS_IZIN,
    KELOMPOK_STATUS
ORDER BY JUMLAH DESC
examples: Sebaran izin per jenis dan status

description: DMT1: Komposisi keseluruhan izin per jenis dan kelompok status (chart Komposisi Keseluruhan)
sql_template:
SELECT
    JENIS_IZIN,
    KELOMPOK_STATUS,
    COUNT(*) AS JUMLAH
FROM (
    SELECT
        PERIZINAN AS JENIS_IZIN,
        CASE
            WHEN KATEGORI_STATUS = 'Terbit' THEN 'Terbit'
            WHEN UPPER(KATEGORI_STATUS) LIKE '%TOLAK%' OR UPPER(KATEGORI_STATUS) LIKE '%DITOLAK%' OR UPPER(KATEGORI_STATUS) LIKE '%REJECTED%' THEN 'Tolak'
            WHEN UPPER(KATEGORI_STATUS) LIKE '%DRAFT%' OR UPPER(KATEGORI_STATUS) LIKE '%PELAKU USAHA%' OR UPPER(KATEGORI_STATUS) LIKE '%WAITING FOR USER%' THEN 'Proses Pelaku Usaha'
            ELSE 'Dalam Proses'
        END AS KELOMPOK_STATUS
    FROM US_DWH.BI_MART_STATUS_PERIZINAN
    WHERE 1 = 1
      AND PERIZINAN IN ('PL', 'PBUMKU', 'PKKPRL', 'PPKH', 'PB')
      AND {tahun}
      AND {bulan}
      AND {perizinan}
      AND {kategori_status}
) sub
GROUP BY
    JENIS_IZIN,
    KELOMPOK_STATUS
ORDER BY JENIS_IZIN, JUMLAH DESC
